details.author: Divyam Goyal
details.shortDescription: All-in-one Open Ticket plugin for sticky messages, welcomer, dashboard, and safe config editing.
details.longDescription: Combines Sticky Messages, a Welcomer module, and a private glassy dashboard for Open Ticket 4.2.x. The dashboard can manage included module settings and safely edit selected Open Ticket JSONC configuration files with validation and backups.
